header.subtitle: Senior Frontend Engineer (React / Next.js) | Admin Platforms | Data-heavy UI

professionalSummary: Senior Frontend Engineer with 8+ years building scalable, data-driven web and mobile applications. Expert in React and Next.js, focused on admin platforms, dashboards, and configuration-heavy interfaces. Proven in designing modular architectures handling complex business logic, transactional flows, reporting, and operational tooling. Background in fintech building reliable systems with advanced API integrations, plus experience leveraging AI-assisted workflows to accelerate delivery and engineering efficiency.

experience.description: Led development of data-driven frontend and mobile applications handling transactional flows. Designed scalable UI architectures for complex API-driven workflows and business-critical operations. Built and optimized data-heavy interfaces, including dashboards and configuration flows, improving performance and reliability while driving architectural decisions and delivery with AI-assisted workflows.

Developed cross-platform applications focused on data-driven UI and backend integration. Built scalable frontend layers consuming APIs and handling complex state, improving performance through reusable components and structured architecture, leveraging AI tools to accelerate delivery.

Led development of a scalable platform focusing on frontend architecture and business logic. Designed modular UI systems and configuration-driven interfaces for complex workflows, improving efficiency and delivery through structured engineering practices and AI-assisted development.

Worked on financial systems focused on transactional flows and API integrations. Built reliable data-driven interfaces for payment and validation processes, ensuring scalability and correctness in complex operations.
